title: Gamermod
description: This is a mod i created with a lot of decorations to recreate a gaming room! some of the things you can use it, the chairs you can sit and move around
body:
Hi guys, the promise is debt! The mod for gamers is here, with many interactive objects

This for versions 1.18, 1.19 and 1.20.1

The mod contains:
1. **Gamer chairs** - 71 (all craftable)
2. **Pc** - 63 (craftable with different effects)
3. **Lights** - 45 (all craftable)
4. **Helmets** - 18 (craftable and different colors)
5. **Microphones** - 27 (different models)
6. **Mp3** - 9 with features and music
7. **Remote control** - 9 controllers for mp3
8. **Caps** - 18 caps
9. **Sunglasses** - 3

    ![Some of the decorations](https://media.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbmR1eWd4cjMyZ29sbmg3NGh3ZzJueHB0NWpuNTZ3c295bzViNzBkdiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/PMUl2tQVJSWPIHUpgc/giphy-downsized-large.gif)
